content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Found 3 in-scope correctness gaps. Verification run during review: nix develop -c cargo test --features test-stub, nix develop -c cargo fmt --check, nix develop -c cargo clippy -- -D warnings, and nix build all completed successfully.

## Amendments

1. src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:269 closes the active bead before terminal review-classification reconciliation runs at src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:313, but load_active_bead_match only treats the active bead as owned when br list still reports Open/InProgress at src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1366. On the normal success path the active bead has just been closed, so a threshold-met propose_new_bead that actually belongs to the current bead bypasses the fix-current-bead-first policy and can be recorded as follow-up work. Include the active bead in the ownership check regardless of terminal status, or run the active-bead ownership check before closing it.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: This directly violates the primary policy order and can still create or surface duplicate follow-up work for issues owned by the active bead.
2. Threshold-met terminal propose_new_bead groups with no existing match only append ProposedBeadRecord rows to proposed-beads.ndjson at src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1957 and write that file at src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1981. This path never appends a milestone journal event with sub_type propose_new_bead_created, even though CLI/daemon success reconciliation invokes this terminal path at src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:313. Add the required structured created event with proposed title/scope/severity, threshold_count, and existing_bead_lookup_ran when the threshold is met.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: The acceptance criteria require created/pending journal observability; the main terminal reconciliation flow currently emits only the pending event.
3. Terminal final-review reconciliation discards the richer propose-new-bead metadata that final_review already preserves. TerminalReviewFinding has only proposed_bead_summary at src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1059, from_final_review copies no proposed_title/proposed_scope/severity/rationale at src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1070, TerminalProposeNewBeadInput then uses summary/body text instead at src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1291, and pending events hard-code severity to unknown at src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1566. Existing-bead matching and journal/proposal records should use the authoritative proposed_title, proposed_scope, severity, and rationale from the accepted final-review amendment when available.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: Ignoring the canonical metadata can make similarity routing compare the wrong text and prevents the required structured journal fields from being accurate.
